anduril: Anduril builds autonomous defense systems and software for the US military and its allies.
anthropic: Anthropic develops Claude, a family of large language models focused on safety and enterprise AI applications.
bland-ai: Bland AI provides an API for businesses to build, test, and deploy conversational AI phone calling agents.
cartesia: Cartesia builds real-time, low-latency generative voice AI models for developers creating interactive audio apps.
cohere: Cohere provides enterprise-focused large language models for search, retrieval-augmented generation, and text processing.
crusoe: Crusoe provides clean cloud computing infrastructure powered by stranded energy sources like flared natural gas.
cursor: Cursor is an AI-powered code editor built on VS Code that helps developers write, edit, and understand code faster.
decagon: Decagon provides generative AI customer support agents that help enterprises automate complex customer service workflows.
deepgram: Deepgram provides fast speech-to-text and text-to-speech APIs for developers building voice-enabled applications.
elevenlabs: ElevenLabs develops highly realistic AI voice generation and text-to-speech software for creators and publishers.
figure: Figure builds general-purpose humanoid robots designed to automate physical labor in manufacturing and logistics.
glean: Glean provides an AI-powered enterprise search and knowledge management platform for employees to find internal data.
grafana-labs: Grafana Labs offers open-source and commercial software for monitoring, visualizing, and analyzing operational metrics.
hebbia: Hebbia builds AI search and knowledge retrieval software that helps financial and legal professionals analyze documents.
linear: Linear builds issue tracking and project management software designed for high-performance software development teams.
mistral: Mistral develops open-weight and commercial large language models for developers and enterprises.
modal: Modal provides a serverless cloud platform for developers to easily run and scale generative AI models and Python code.
motherduck: MotherDuck provides a serverless, collaborative cloud data warehouse based on the open-source DuckDB database.
palantir: Palantir builds data integration and analytics software for government intelligence agencies and large enterprises.
perplexity: Perplexity offers an AI-powered conversational search engine that provides users with cited answers from the web.
physical-intelligence: Physical Intelligence develops foundational AI models to bring general-purpose intelligence to various robotic hardware.
ramp: Ramp provides corporate cards and spend management software to help businesses control expenses and automate finance.
sayari: Sayari provides global corporate transparency and supply chain risk data to government and enterprise clients.
sentry: Sentry provides application performance monitoring and error tracking software for developers to fix code issues.
sierra: Sierra builds conversational AI agents that enable consumer brands to automate and elevate their customer service.
stability-ai: Stability AI develops open-access generative AI models for generating images, video, audio, and text.
suki: Suki provides an AI-powered voice assistant that helps healthcare clinicians automate medical charting and documentation.
together: Together AI provides cloud infrastructure for developers to train, fine-tune, and run open-source AI models.
turbopuffer: Turbopuffer provides a fast, serverless vector database designed for developers building scalable AI applications.
vannevar-labs: Vannevar Labs builds defense software that analyzes foreign text to provide intelligence to the US military.
vanta: Vanta provides automated security and compliance platforms to help businesses achieve certifications like SOC 2 and HIPAA.
vapi: Vapi provides an API platform for developers to build, test, and deploy low-latency voice AI assistants.
vercel: Vercel provides a cloud platform for frontend developers to build, deploy, and host web applications and static sites.
